official_sources.evidence: Official Biconomy product material includes Futures/Perpetual surfaces, but stable endpoint specs are not pinned in the spot adapter.

runtime_isolation: Do not infer Biconomy futures/perpetual runtime from spot REST endpoints or spot private account parsers.
unsupported_runtime_reason: Biconomy futures/perpetual surfaces have official product-line clues, but stable endpoint specs, contract metadata, positions/risk and order lifecycle parsers are not pinned.
required_auth_and_scope: stable futures/perpetual API host and auth scheme
read-only and trade permission scope guard
unsafe_to_promote_without: contract metadata and risk parser fixtures
position readback and order lifecycle parser coverage
